channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: The fake scientist
item.description: Source: here. He was born in the Gangetic doab in a clan of vaNija-s. He had inherited the skill honed by centuries of selection in business transactions of “cracking the situation”.+++(4)+++ However, he did not have deep introspective skills or a passion for acquiring knowledge in a wider sense. He passed his way through school and eventually reached college to get what in India is called an ordinary B.Sc. degree in something related to biology.

item.title: 2019 indian rates
item.description: Source: TW I’ve some really bad news for Indians but it might give 1 explanation for our terrible performance after independence. The Department of Health and Human Services of the USA releases a list of cases where it has confirmed scientific fraud by data manipulation and faking from 2011 to date. A basic analysis of this data reveals the following summarized in the below table. It summarize the count of science fraud cases by population of origin: Indian (all of H origin);European, Chinese etc.
